description.value: Ground shakes violently in area. All creatures make [[/save type=reflex]]. Compare your targeting successes to their save successes. If you have more, creatures fall Prone. Structures may collapse (GM discretion). Area becomes difficult terrain.

system.effect: Ground shakes violently in area. All creatures make Reflex save. Compare your targeting successes to their save successes. If you have more, creatures fall Prone. Structures may collapse (GM discretion). Area becomes difficult terrain.
system.targetingSuccessScaling: 0 = Fails, 1 = Prone (1 round, 20ft radius), 2 = Prone (1 minute, 20ft radius), 3 = Prone (1 minute, 40ft radius)
system.weavingRoll: Earth Potential + Earth Mastery / Space Potential + Space Mastery
